glosses.ja: 耳が聞こえない; しびれた

translations.es: Se me ha dormido el pie.
translations.it: Mi si è addormentato il piede.
translations.hi: मेरा पैर सुन्न हो गया है.
translations.da: Min fod er faldet i søvn.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Fuß'; agrees with masculine singular nominative; marks 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun, masculine singular nominative; head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicative.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement, describing the state of 'Fuß'.

sentences.target: Ich bin taub auf dem linken Ohr.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bɪn taʊ̯p aʊ̯f deːm ˈlɪŋkən oːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich bin taub auf dem linken Ohr.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bɪn taʊ̯p aʊ̯f deːm ˈlɪŋkən oːɐ̯/
translations.en: I am deaf in my left ear.
translations.es: No oigo por el oído izquierdo.
translations.fr: Je n’entends pas de l’oreille gauche.
translations.pt: Não ouço com o ouvido esquerdo.
translations.vi: Tôi không nghe được bằng tai trái.
translations.nl: Ik hoor niets met mijn linkeroor.
translations.hi: मेरे बाएँ कान से सुनाई नहीं देती है.
translations.el: Δεν ακούω από το αριστερό μου αυτί.
translations.nb: Jeg hører ikke med venstre øre.
translations.id: Saya tidak bisa mendengar dengan telinga kiri.
translations.sv: Jag hör inte på vänster öra.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke høre med venstre øre.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 1st person singular; links the subject to the predicative.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement; base state modified by the PP that follows.
Preposition introducing a dative PP specifying the affected area.
Definite article, dative singular neuter agreeing with 'Ohr'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Ohr'; dative singular neuter form.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Der Schnee macht meine Zehen taub.

translations.de: Der Schnee macht meine Zehen taub.
translations.en: The snow makes my toes numb.
translations.es: La nieve me deja los dedos de los pies dormidos.
translations.it: La neve mi intorpidisce le dita dei piedi.
translations.yue: 啲雪令我腳趾凍到麻晒。
translations.ru: Из-за снега у меня немеют пальцы ног.
translations.pt: A neve deixa meus dedos dos pés dormentes.
translations.he: השלג גורם לאצבעות הרגליים שלי להירדם.
translations.vi: Tuyết làm các ngón chân tôi tê cóng.
translations.nl: De sneeuw maakt mijn tenen gevoelloos.
translations.uk: Через сніг у мене німіють пальці ніг.
translations.hi: बर्फ से मेरे पैर की उँगलियाँ सुन्न हो जाती हैं.
translations.pl: Przez śnieg drętwieją mi palce u stóp.
translations.el: Από το χιόνι μου μουδιάζουν τα δάχτυλα των ποδιών.
translations.id: Salju membuat jari-jari kaki saya mati rasa.
translations.sv: Snön gör att mina tår domnar.
translations.ro: Zăpada îmi amorțește degetele de la picioare.
translations.cs: Od sněhu mi trnou prsty na nohou.
translations.ja: 雪でつま先がしびれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Schnee'.
Common noun, masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and a resultative adjective.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Zehen'; accusative plural agreement.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'macht'.
Resultative adjective complement describing the resultant state of 'Zehen'.

sentences.target: Meine Ohren sind taub vom Lärm.

translations.de: Meine Ohren sind taub vom Lärm.
translations.en: My ears are numb from the noise.
translations.es: El ruido me deja los oídos embotados.
translations.fr: Mes oreilles sont engourdies par le bruit.
translations.it: Le mie orecchie sono intorpidite dal rumore.
translations.zh-Hans: 噪音把我的耳朵震麻了。
translations.ru: От шума у меня уши онемели.
translations.pt: O barulho deixa meus ouvidos dormentes.
translations.vi: Tai tôi tê đi vì tiếng ồn.
translations.nl: Door het lawaai zijn mijn oren verdoofd.
translations.hi: शोर से मेरे कान सुन्न हो गए हैं.
translations.el: Τα αυτιά μου μουδιάζουν από τον θόρυβο.
translations.nb: Ørene mine er numne av bråket.
translations.id: Telinga saya mati rasa karena kebisingan.
translations.sv: Mina öron är domnade av bullret.
translations.ro: Urechile îmi sunt amorțite din cauza zgomotului.
translations.da: Mine ører er følelsesløse af larmen.
translations.ja: 騒音で耳がしびれている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Ohren'; nominative plural agreement.
Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person plural; links subject to the predicative.
Predicative adjective functioning as subject complement.
Preposition (contracted form of 'von dem') introducing a dative PP that indicates cause.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'vom'; expresses the cause.
